response.justification: Bogdan has a genuine two-decade engineering career spanning web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains, and his current role touches AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling. However, this is a director-level IC role requiring recognized AI expertise, a track record of shipping AI products or platforms at scale, strategic customer advisory experience, and organizational influence — none of which appear in the resume. His AI involvement is limited to roughly one year in a supporting tooling capacity, he holds no advanced degree in an AI-related field, and there is no evidence of thought leadership, executive-level advisory work, or driving engineering strategy across an organization.
strengths: ~20 years of hands-on engineering across diverse domains (web, mobile, embedded, infrastructure, data)
Current role involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, indicating early practical exposure to agentic AI tooling
Entrepreneurial track record through founding Northwind Labs and building open-source platforms used in production
concerns: AI expertise is shallow and recent (~1 year), far below the 'recognized expertise with demonstrated AI products or platforms' the role requires
No evidence of director-level leadership, strategic customer or partner advisory, or cross-organizational engineering influence
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and cloud depth appears limited to AWS CDK and Kubernetes operational use

key_factors.factor: Absence of director-level leadership and advisory experience
